category_sources: source_facts.description says TUI for Atlassian Jira from the shell; official documentation describes JiraTUI as a text UI for interacting with Jira from your shell.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use JiraTUI; source_facts.name is jiratui.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to Read the Docs; documentation covers installation, initial configuration, usage, settings, and developer docs.
repo_sources: Official homepage links its GitHub icon to https://github.com/whyisdifficult/jiratui.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs identify JiraTUI as a shell-based TUI/CLI for Atlassian Jira.
